overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rural plantation area toward a large mansion. The character traverses dirt paths through fields and approaches the estate gate on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural plantation approach path with wooden entry gate

events.description: character walks through the wooden starting gate onto the dirt path
dense corn fields become prominent on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt path away from the starting gate toward the distant plantation house

entered.detail: wooden fence gate with horizontal rails at the beginning of the path
brown dirt trail cutting through the grassy fields
large two-story wooden mansion with porch and chimneys visible in the distance
field of tall green corn stalks on the left side of the path
scattered oak trees lining the right side of the approach

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a wooden fence gate on a rural plantation. The character walks through the gate onto a dirt path cutting through open fields, with a large plantation house visible in the far distance. Corn fields line the left side while scattered trees appear on the right under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland path between crop fields and plantation outbuildings

events.description: smaller outbuildings become visible on the sides of the path near the main estate
wooden fencing appears along the right side marking property boundaries

agents.ego_description: continuing down the dirt path with the plantation house growing larger in view

entered.detail: small wooden barn or shed structure to the left of the path
small wooden outbuilding visible on the right side near the main house
wooden split-rail fence marking the property line

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open farmland with the plantation house now noticeably closer. Outbuildings appear on both sides of the path, and wooden fencing marks the estate boundaries. The corn fields fall behind as the character approaches the main estate grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation estate entrance with brick gate pillars and workers

events.description: approaching the estate entrance with brick gate pillars and fenced grounds
character slows and turns right toward the gate entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the plantation gate and turning right toward the entrance

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the brick gate pillar on the left side

entered.detail: tall red brick pillar marking the left side of the estate entrance
tall red brick pillar marking the right side of the estate entrance
wooden fence running along the right side of the path near the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the plantation estate entrance marked by brick gate pillars and wooden fencing. Workers are visible near the gate. The mansion looms large directly ahead before the character turns right toward the gated entrance, transitioning from the open path to the estate grounds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the edge of a rural plantation toward the imposing entrance of a grand estate. It begins as the character passes through a wooden fence gate onto a dirt path, moving through open fields with corn on the left and scattered trees on the right under a bright, clear sky. As the character advances, the distant plantation house grows larger and the cornfields recede, replaced by various outbuildings and wooden fencing that mark the estate boundaries. The scene then shifts toward the main entrance, where the mansion looms large ahead and workers appear near the perimeter. Finally, the camera follows the character as they turn right toward the brick gate pillars, transitioning from the open farmland into the formal grounds of the estate.
